title: Ling Tianhou
content:
Contents

1

Overview

2

Appearance

3

Background

4

History

Overview
[
]

Ling Tianhou
 is the sect leader of the 
Da Lou Sword Sect
 on 
Planet Da Lou
. He is the, self-proclaimed, rival of 
All-Seer
 but he has yet to beat him even once. But despite all his defeat, he has never given up.

Appearance
[
]

This person was wearing a green robe and his white hair moved without any wind. Although he looked skinny, the aura he gave off was very oppressive. This was especially true for the four illusionary swords behind his back

Background
[
]

In the past, he was friends with All-Seer but something happened inside the 
East Demon Spirit Sea
 that they entered. Afterwards, they became enemies.

Thousands of years ago, he was among the three invited to cultivate in the 
Brilliant Void Cultivation Sect
 along with All-Seer and Mortal Woman.

History
[
]

When the East Demon Spirit Sea opened, he sent 
Greed
 with his disciples to look after them. He also gave his 12 disciples a sliver of his sword energy, each, as a live-saving treasure.

After a few centuries, he, 
Blood Ancestor
, All-Seer and others entered the East Demon Spirit Sea but they instantly found that something was wrong. Soon after, they heard from Greed that 
Wang Lin
 stole the main token required to enter Celestial Emperor 
Qing Lin
's main cultivation cave. They chased after Wang Lin only to see him escape to the 
Allheaven Star System
. They then sent Greed after Wang Lin to the Allheaven Star System.

A few centuries later, when Wang Lin returned to 
Planet Tian Yun
, he was the first to spar with him. He was shocked to find that Wang Lin could easily block one of his spells.

Later, he saved Wang Lin from All-Seer after the former took the dying 
Bai Wei
's Extreme Yang. He then invited Wang Lin to be an elder of the Da Lou Sword Sect.
